title: Create Mods Survival Modpack
body:
Create Your World is a modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with the innovative and mechanical gameplay of the Create Mod. Dive deep into a world where automation and creativity come together seamlessly, allowing you to build intricate contraptions, vast factories, and innovative systems to tackle in-game challenges.

This modpack adds everything you need to push the boundaries of automation with enhanced power systems, intricate machines, and complex contraptions, all while maintaining the charm of Minecraft’s blocky world. Utilize mechanical components like belts, gears, and pistons to create transport systems, farming machines, and even automated base defenses!
